race.comment: I'M FOXING (10) came home strongly beaten 0.9 lengths over 1100m at Pakenham on debut. There was plenty to like about that, and she's prepared well. Should go close with the extra fitness. BOYD (2) resumes for a leading stable and has been gelded. Has been fitted with two jumpouts and Nolen rides and has been with him all along. Has a low gate and ran his best figure fresh. SELKIE (12) is a three-year-old filly on debut for the Lloyd Kennewell stable. A good gate is sure to assist, and she's shown enough in her lead-up to take seriously. LONGREACH DROVER (4) resumes and has been a little unlucky not to have broken through. She's jumped out well and maps for a soft run. Well in the mix.
